narrative: A Senior Applied Scientist from Niramai, bringing 9 years of experience, stands out due to an exceptional JD-relevant skill match for our Senior AI/ML Engineer role. Their verified skill depth in areas like LoRA, Search Infrastructure, NLP, and Indexing Algorithms, including BM25, is highly pertinent to our Search & Retrieval focus. While their experience level alignment is strong and company background is product-first, their current location in Kolkata is not ideal for our Pune/Noida requirement. Additionally, minor concerns flagged regarding profile credibility warrant further investigation during screening.
